Guys, Those Who Not Knowing this States , stop blindly trusting PolyMarket showing DMK at 80% 🚨
This is NOT real sentiment. Some Random wallets shares are inflating the numbers. That’s not public opinion , that’s manipulation.
Ground reality is completely different 👇
📊 Recent public discussions, local sentiment, and unofficial polls clearly show momentum shifting towards ADMK (NDA alliance) and Vijay’s TVK.
🔥 Both are leading in buzz, grassroots support and voter mood.
This election is a direct fight between ADMK vs TVK , not DMK.
Tamil Nadu pattern is very clear:
➡️ People don’t repeat the same party easily
➡️ Power alternates between DMK & ADMK
➡️ DMK already ruled the last 5 years
⚠️ That means change is coming.
💥 Either ADMK comes back strong
💥 Or TVK creates a massive upset
But DMK at 80%? That’s far from reality.
👉 Smart money follows ground sentiment, not manipulated markets.
👉 Position yourself early before the shift becomes obvious.
Don’t get trapped. Think smart. Invest smarter.

body: I still wonder how you people are confidently believing TVK won’t win. Even DMK election candidates and DMK supporters don’t have the courage to bet like that. TVK may look like a new party, but they have been doing welfare activities, including during all natural disasters, in a structured way for 20 years under the name Vijay Makkal Iyakkam (VMI). This is the first time they are going to see what they have planted all these years. Most of the election candidates are from the VMI, and they are well known in those places. So, not only the leader’s face, but their activities over all these years will also help them shine. It’s not like other actor-turned-politician parties
all real and true, TVK should be trading at 30c minimum

Hi bro, I completely agree that TVK is an emerging party but I believe that they are going to get 15 - 20 % in all constituencies and either DMK or ADMK will edge them over. The current situation is in such a way that TVK without any alliance will not win a majority.  What seemed to be an easy win for DMK 3 months back has turned into a very tough battle now and the million dollar question is whose vote share is TVK going to eat into and the entire media is clueless about it. My opinion is that ADMK will win with a thin majority and everyone is underestimating them but let's see. This election is going to be one hell of an election.

TN people are not in the mood to welcome BJP, so anyone in alliance with the BJP is already not in the game. Therefore, the only options are DMK and TVK. Still, you are believing in ADMK; I suggest selling ADMK YES and buying DMK NO, since both are almost at the same price. As you believe ADMK will win or as I believe TVK will win, you will be in profit.
